sections.paragraph:
τάσσω [cp. τάξις] (basic idea relates to arrangement so as to be in order) ‘put in arranged order’

—a. put in official rank or position Mt 8:9 v.l.; Lk 7:8; Ro 13:1; set a time for official event Ac 28:23; enroll in line as beneficiary 13:48; devote oneself for service 1 Cor 16:15.

—b. make arrangement for someth. Mt 28:16; Ac 15:2; 18:2; 22:10.
